title: Keto Chicken Tortilla Española
description: A Spanish-inspired twist on the classic omelette, made keto-friendly with a focus on rich and creamy flavors.
instructions: Crack 2 eggs into a bowl and whisk together.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add diced garlicky, chicken, tortilla, and espanola.
Cook until the chicken is browned and the vegetables are softened.
Pour the whisked eggs over the top of the mixture.
Cook until the eggs are almost set.
Use a spatula to gently fold the omelette in half.
Slide the omelette out of the skillet onto a plate.
